topic: Iran 2-2 New Zealand — Elijah Just's brace nearly shocks Iran, who fight back twice; Group G all level

hook.first_frame_text: HE SCORED TWICE — NOBODY KNEW HIM
hook.spoken_hook: Nobody knew his name. Then he scored twice at a World Cup.

scenes.voiceover: Nobody knew his name. Then he scored twice.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Deep black background, gold gradient spotlight cone, a lone silhouetted footballer in a faceless white-and-black kit standing in the beam, broadcast-premium, vertical 9:16, crisp bold condensed white type space at top

scenes.voiceover: Seven minutes in, Elijah Just put New Zealand ahead.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Silhouetted crowd erupting under stadium floodlights, black and gold tone, faceless, vertical 9:16, premium broadcast atmosphere

scenes.voiceover: Iran hit straight back. Rezaeian, level by halftime.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Ramin Rezaeian in the white Iran national kit, broadcast-premium portrait treatment, deep black and gold graded background, vertical 9:16

scenes.voiceover: Then the unknown struck again. New Zealand ahead twice.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Moody floodlight bokeh, tension, deep black with warm gold flares, faceless, vertical 9:16, broadcast premium

scenes.voiceover: Iran refused to lose. Mohebbi's header, two-all.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Silhouetted crowd erupting, gold light burst, faceless celebration, deep black and gold, vertical 9:16, premium broadcast

scenes.voiceover: Every Group G team has a point. Subscribe for your daily World Cup.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Clean ranked group-standings table, deep black background, gold accent header, crisp white condensed type, vertical 9:16, premium broadcast

comment_bait: Group G's wide open now — who escapes it, the favourites or the minnows? Make your case, I'm in the replies.
cta: Subscribe for your daily World Cup stories
music_mood: tense building drama with a triumphant late lift

thumbnail.concept: Scoreboard reading IRN 2-2 NZL in gold, New Zealand flag, bold white 'LED TWICE' over a floodlit black-and-gold stadium

youtube_title: Iran 2-2 New Zealand: The Minnows Twice Led Team Melli | World Cup 2026
youtube_description: New Zealand's Elijah Just scored twice and twice put the lead over Iran — but Team Melli fought back both times to draw 2-2. Every team in Group G now has a point after Matchday 1. Who escapes the group? #WorldCup2026
instagram_caption: Elijah Just scored twice. Iran came back twice. 2-2 and Group G is a logjam. Group G's wide open now — who actually escapes it, the favourites or the minnows? Make your case, I'm in the replies. Subscribe for your daily World Cup stories.
tiktok_caption: Two goals from a man nobody knew. Iran 2-2 New Zealand. Group G's wide open — who escapes it? I'm in the replies.
